title: shalaph #8025
definition:
1) to draw out or off, take off
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to draw out
        1a2) to draw off
        1a3) to shoot up, draw out (of blade of grass on roof)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to draw out or off, take off
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to draw out
        1a2) to draw off
        1a3) to shoot up, draw out (of blade of grass on roof)

    NASB:  to draw out or off
